You have survived 100% of your bad days.
A craving usually passes in a few minutes. Just wait it out.
Don't trade what you want most for what you want right now.
Every time you resist, your brain builds a new pathway.
Play the tape forward. You know exactly how it ends.
It is just an urge. You don't have to act on it.
Your future self is depending on what you do right now.
One day at a time. Just focus on today.
Discomfort is the price of admission to a better life.
